title: Conditional required (draft 2019-09 / 2020-12)
description: Demonstrates keywords added after draft-04: dependentRequired, dependentSchemas and if/then/else. The required indicator (*) appears dynamically as you fill the trigger fields.

creditCard.title: Credit card number
creditCard.description: Fill this in to make 'Billing ZIP' required (dependentRequired).

billingZip.title: Billing ZIP
billingZip.description: Required only when a credit card number is entered.

email.title: E-mail
email.description: Fill this in to make 'Confirm e-mail' required (dependentSchemas).

emailConfirm.title: Confirm e-mail
emailConfirm.description: Required only when an e-mail is entered.

accountType.title: Account type
accountType.description: Pick 'business' to require Company name, otherwise Personal ID is required (if/then/else).

personalId.title: Personal ID
personalId.description: Required when account type is not 'business'.
